_description: Patient (P006) had SE020A (cataract right eye) this policy year. Now presenting with cataract right eye again. Phase 3 should find SE020A in past_claims and trigger SPECIAL_CONDITIONS_RULE_TRIGGERED if that procedure has special_conditions_rule=True in KB-2. Tests the special conditions code path.

clinical.chief_complaints: Persistent vision problems right eye after prior cataract surgery 10 months ago, patient claims IOL may have dislocated, photophobia and glare
clinical.history_of_present_illness: Patient underwent cataract surgery (phacoemulsification with IOL) right eye 10 months ago. Now complaining of recurrence of visual difficulty, glare, and photophobia. Claims vision has deteriorated again. Consulting for re-evaluation and possible intervention. BCVA right eye currently 6/24.
clinical.provisional_diagnosis: Posterior capsular opacification (PCO) right eye post phacoemulsification — possible IOL dislocation
clinical.planned_procedure: YAG laser capsulotomy or IOL repositioning right eye

examination_findings.local: Right eye: BCVA 6/24. Slit lamp shows IOL in position, posterior capsular haziness grade 2. No IOL dislocation visible. IOP 15 mmHg.

investigations.result_summary: BCVA right eye 6/24, not improving with refraction. Slit lamp: IOL centred, posterior capsular opacification grade 2. IOP: 15 mmHg RE, 14 mmHg LE.

clinical.past_medical_history: Hypertension on medication. Prior cataract surgery right eye under PM-JAY (procedure SE020A, August 2025).
clinical.past_surgical_history: Phacoemulsification with IOL right eye, August 2025 (SE020A under PM-JAY).

non_clinical_documents_in_hand.label: Prior PM-JAY claim for SE020A August 2025

clinical.notes: Prior PM-JAY claim SE020A for same eye this policy year. Phase 3 should check past_claims and trigger SPECIAL_CONDITIONS_RULE_TRIGGERED if applicable.
